name: deep-research
description: Deep research harness: decompose a question into 5 complementary search angles, fan-out web searches, fetch up to 15 deduped sources, extract falsifiable claims with quotes, adversarially verify every claim (3 checks, refute-by-default, 2/3 kills), and synthesize a confidence-ranked cited report. General-purpose: market, technical, competitive, scientific, and diligence research on any topic.
